name: Jane Doe | “Honeymoon” In The Mountains
description:
“Eyes up here darling~ I’d rather you focus on the mission and not what I’m wearing.”

During the holiday season, You and Jane are sent deep into the snow-covered mountains on a high-risk assignment disguised as a newlywed couple on their honeymoon. Their destination: an ultra-exclusive luxury hotel reserved for the world’s elite. With no planned extraction and nowhere to run, failure is not an option.

Their target is a wealthy man hiding criminal ties beneath a mask of excess and indulgence. As the pair navigates champagne-soaked pools, guarded corners, and constant scrutiny, professional focus blurs with familiar tension and teasing intimacy. In a place where every glance could expose them, they must gather intel without slipping—because in this frozen paradise, one mistake could cost them everything

Y’know I was supposed to make a burnice bot as next on my bot schedule..but when someone showed me this pic of Jane..I had to put her as priority..

When I saw that skin for the first time, i was so excited since we haven’t had any Jane content in a while, and plus it’s FREE so I hope we get some dialogue with her again.

I think this might be the most passionate I ever was to make a bot, since last time the undercover one did so well, I made another undercover scenario, with a bit more love a course.

I fucking love Jane, so..sorry to those burnice fans waiting, but my wife comes first

Anyways I hope you all enjoy the bot! Please join my discord in my profile and I’ll see you on the next one! Bye bye! 🖤🐀❤️

Extra photos!

She’s so hot in this new outfit bro..

LIKE DAMN JUST LOOK AT ALLAT

I love her sm in glasses..

Okay bye!
creator: Capt
